ui_hotkey_tips: Hotkeys to open or hide Wox
ui_hotkey_press_hint: Press any key to set hotkey, or double click modifier keys
ui_hotkey_conflict_main: This hotkey is already used by the main Wox hotkey.
ui_hotkey_conflict_selection: This hotkey is already used by the selection hotkey.
ui_hotkey_conflict_query: This hotkey is already used by Query Hotkey: {query}
ui_hotkey_conflict_system: This hotkey is already used by another app or the system.
ui_selection_hotkey_tips: Hotkeys to do actions on selected text or files
ui_hotkey_ignore_apps_tips: When one of these apps is active, Wox global hotkeys on this platform will be ignored
ui_hotkey_ignore_apps_search: Search apps by name, identity, or path
ui_use_pinyin_tips: When selected, Wox will convert Chinese into Pinyin
ui_launch_mode_tips: Controls the query box state when Wox transitions from hidden to visible
ui_launch_mode_fresh_tips: Clear the query box each time Wox is shown, ideal for quick new tasks
ui_launch_mode_continue_tips: Preserve the last query text with full selection, convenient for quick modifications
ui_start_page_tips: Controls what to display when the query box is empty
ui_start_page_blank_tips: Show nothing when the query is empty
ui_start_page_mru_tips: Show recently used items when the query is empty for quick access
ui_hide_on_lost_focus_tips: When selected, Wox will hide when it loses focus
ui_hide_on_start_tips: When selected, Wox will hide when it starts
ui_enable_auto_update_tips: When selected, Wox will automatically download updates in the background but will not install them until you confirm
ui_update_success: Successfully updated to the latest version
ui_show_tray_tips: When selected, Wox will show a tray icon
ui_show_position_tips: Select where you want Wox to appear on your screen
ui_switch_input_method_abc_tips: When selected, the input method will be switched to english when the query box gains focus
ui_query_hotkeys_tips: Quickly trigger predefined queries using hotkeys. Supports variables (like selected text, browser URL, etc.) to build dynamic queries, and can be set to silent execution mode to automatically execute single results.
ui_query_shortcuts_tips: Set short aliases for frequently used queries. A shortcut only expands when it is the complete first word of the query, such as 'tr' or 'tr text', so it will not affect normal queries like 'translate'. For example: typing 'tr' expands to 'chatgpt translate'.
ui_general_description: Configure core behavior and global preferences for Wox.
ui_ui_description: Customize launcher appearance and on-screen behavior.
ui_ai_description: Manage AI providers used by Wox features and plugins.
ui_autostart_tips: When selected, Wox will start automatically when the computer starts
ui_network_description: Configure proxy settings for Wox network requests.
ui_data_description: Manage storage, backups, and diagnostic logs.
ui_data_config_location_tips: The location where Wox stores your configuration and data files, you can change it to cloud storage location(e.g. iCloud) to sync configurations and data on different computers
ui_data_config_location_change_confirm: Are you sure you want to change the configuration location to {0}? This will copy all your current settings and data to the new location.
ui_data_config_location_change_success_m: Configuration location has been changed successfully
ui_debug_description: Toggle developer diagnostics shown in launcher results.
ui_debug_show_score_tail_tips: Show result ranking scores as tail tags in development mode.
ui_debug_show_performance_tail_tips: Show query flush batch and elapsed time as tail tags in development mode.
ui_runtime_settings_description: Review plugin runtime status and configure executable paths.
ui_runtime_status_executable_missing_det: {runtime} was not found. Install it or configure the executable path below.
ui_runtime_status_unsupported_version_de: {runtime} is below the minimum supported version. Upgrade it or configure another executable path.
ui_runtime_status_start_failed_detail: The runtime host failed to start. Check the error details and retry after fixing the runtime.
ui_runtime_windows_vc_redist_missing_int: Wox cannot start its Windows UI because the Microsoft Visual C++ runtime is missing.
ui_runtime_windows_vc_redist_status_dll_: Windows reported STATUS_DLL_NOT_FOUND (%s) while starting wox-ui.exe.
ui_runtime_windows_vc_redist_install: Install Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable 2015-2022 (x64), then restart Wox.
ui_runtime_windows_vc_redist_open_downlo: Open the Microsoft download page now?
ui_runtime_windows_vc_redist_missing_log: Missing Windows UI runtime dependencies: %s. Install Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable 2015-2022 x64 from %s
ui_runtime_windows_vc_redist_status_log: UI app exited with STATUS_DLL_NOT_FOUND(%s). Install Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable 2015-2022 x64 from %s
ui_plugin_install_runtime_missing_detail: {plugin} requires {runtime}. Install {runtime} or configure its executable path in runtime settings.
ui_plugin_install_runtime_unsupported_de: {plugin} requires a supported {runtime}. Upgrade {runtime} or configure a compatible executable path in runtime settings.
ui_plugin_install_runtime_start_failed_d: {runtime} Host failed to start. Fix the error and restart the Host.
ui_runtime_python_path_tips: Custom Python executable path. Wox requires Python 3.10 or later. Leave empty to use auto-detection.
ui_runtime_nodejs_path_tips: Custom Node.js executable path. Wox requires Node.js 20.0.0 or later. Leave empty to use auto-detection.
ui_runtime_python_version_unsupported: Python {version} is not supported. Wox requires Python {minimumVersion} or later.
ui_runtime_nodejs_version_unsupported: Node.js {version} is not supported. Wox requires Node.js {minimumVersion} or later.
ui_setting_theme_auto_appearance_hint: This theme will automatically switch between light and dark modes based on your system appearance settings.
ui_theme_editor_invalid_color: Use a valid hex color, for example #00A88E
ui_theme_editor_preview_body: This text preview uses the same theme tokens that normal Wox previews use. Edit colors on the left and the launcher surface updates immediately.
ui_query_hotkeys_hotkey_tooltip: The hotkey to trigger the query.
ui_query_hotkeys_query_tooltip:
The query when the hotkey is triggered. Type { to insert dynamic variables.

Using the active browser URL variable requires the Wox Chrome extension: [Install Wox Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/wox/bjbkdpjdnagiongdfemjhepkkglnailh)
ui_query_variable_input_text_tooltip: Insert the text passed to this AI command.
ui_query_variable_active_browser_url_too: Insert the URL of the active browser tab.
ui_query_variable_file_explorer_path_too: Insert the current file explorer folder path.
ui_query_hotkeys_position_tooltip: Choose where this query hotkey opens. System Default follows the global Show Position setting. Fixed positions are calculated on the mouse screen.
ui_query_hotkeys_hide_query_box_tooltip: Hide the query box when this query hotkey opens.
ui_query_hotkeys_hide_toolbar_tooltip: Hide the toolbar when this query hotkey opens.
ui_query_hotkeys_width_tooltip: Optional. Window width in pixels for this query hotkey. Empty uses the global app width.
ui_query_hotkeys_max_result_count_toolti: Optional. Maximum number of results shown for this query hotkey (5-15 items). Empty uses the global maximum results setting.
ui_query_hotkeys_silent_tooltip:
When selected, if the count of query result is 1, Wox will execute the query directly without showing the result list.

This is useful when you have a query that always return one result and you want to execute it directly.
Note: This option is only available when the query result count is 1. Otherwise it will be ignored and notify a warning.
ui_disabled_tooltip: When selected, this item is temporarily disabled without being deleted.
ui_query_shortcuts_query_tooltip: The query represented by the shortcut.
ui_tray_queries_tips: Add tray query icons. Clicking an icon opens Wox near the tray/menu bar and runs the configured query.
ui_tray_queries_query_tooltip: The query to run when this tray icon is clicked.
ui_tray_queries_hide_query_box_tooltip: Hide the query box when this tray query opens.
ui_tray_queries_hide_toolbar_tooltip: Hide the toolbar when this tray query opens.
ui_tray_queries_width_tooltip: Optional. Window width in pixels for this tray query. Empty means app width / 2.
ui_tray_queries_max_result_count_tooltip: Optional. Maximum number of results shown for this tray query (5-15 items). Empty uses the global maximum results setting.
ui_ai_providers_name_tooltip: The AI provider name. If your provider is not listed, choose openai and configure it with an alias and custom API host. Many providers are compatible with the OpenAI host format.
ui_ai_providers_alias_tooltip: Optional. Used to distinguish multiple configs for the same provider.
ui_ai_providers_api_key_tooltip: The API key of the AI provider.
ui_ai_providers_host_tooltip: The host of the AI provider.
ui_ai_mcp_server_enable_tips: Enable MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI plugin development. When enabled, AI tools like Claude Desktop can connect to help develop Wox plugins.
ui_ai_mcp_server_port_tips: The port number for the MCP server. Remote URL: http://localhost:{port}/mcp
ui_plugin_no_settings_subtitle: This plugin works without additional configuration. You can still review trigger keywords, commands, and privacy details in the other tabs.
ui_plugin_no_trigger_keywords: This plugin has no trigger keywords
ui_plugin_no_commands_subtitle: This plugin does not provide subcommands after its trigger keyword. Use the trigger keyword directly.
ui_plugin_no_data_access: This plugin requires no data access
ui_plugin_no_data_access_subtitle: This plugin does not request sensitive data such as the active window, browser URL, or AI model access.
ui_plugin_table_minimum_row_delete_messa: At least one row must remain
ui_plugin_data_access_title: This plugin requires access to the following data:
ui_plugin_privacy_window_name_desc: E.g. you are using google chrome to view webpages, you activate Wox and this plugin will get the active window name as "Google Chrome"
ui_plugin_privacy_window_pid_desc: E.g. you are using google chrome to view webpages, you activate Wox and this plugin will get the active window process id as "1234"
ui_plugin_privacy_browser_url_desc: E.g. you are using google chrome to view webpages, you activate Wox and this plugin will get the url of active tab you are viewing

ui_plugin_trigger_keyword_keep_one: A plugin must keep at least one trigger keyword

ui_plugin_trigger_keywords_tip: Trigger keywords are prefixes you type in Wox to activate this plugin. Use "*" to make it global (no keyword).
ui_plugin_commands_tip: Commands are sub-commands after the trigger keyword. Type "<trigger> <command> " (note the trailing space) to enter command mode.

ui_privacy_description: Control anonymous usage statistics and inspect sample payloads.
ui_privacy_anonymous_stats_description: Helps us understand overall Wox usage to improve the application. Only anonymous data such as OS type (Windows/macOS/Linux) and Wox version is collected. No personal information, query content, or IP addresses are ever sent.

ui_ai_model_selector_no_models_desc: Please go to Settings > AI to configure a provider and API key.

plugin_bug_report_subtitle_on: Export a report or turn diagnostics off
plugin_bug_report_action_enable_restart: Enable bug aware mode and restart Wox
plugin_bug_report_notify_enable_failed: Failed to enable bug aware mode: %s

plugin_bug_report_notify_disable_failed: Failed to disable bug aware mode: %s
plugin_bug_report_preview:
## Bug aware mode

Use this when a Wox problem needs a clean reproduction report, such as unexpected exits, disappearing windows, stuck behavior, plugin errors, or UI issues.

After enabling it, Wox will restart and collect a cleaner set of diagnostic logs.

When the problem happens again, come back here, export diagnostics, and attach the zip file to your issue.

Turn this mode off after you finish collecting the report.
plugin_glance_wox_memory_description: Combined Wox core and Flutter memory footprint
plugin_explorer_plugin_description: Search files in the currently active file manager window
plugin_file_setting_roots_tooltip: Configure every directory Wox indexes for file search. The default root is your home directory (~).
plugin_file_setting_skip_hidden_files_to: Skip files and folders whose names start with a dot, such as .git, .cache, and .DS_Store.
plugin_file_setting_ignore_patterns_tool: Exclude matching files and folders from the file search index. Wox also respects .gitignore files automatically. Supports glob patterns like node_modules, *.tmp, and **/cache/**.
plugin_file_setting_ignore_pattern_toolt: Use a name or glob pattern. Patterns without / match any path segment; patterns with / match the full or root-relative path.

plugin_screenshot_ocr_enabled_tooltip: Automatically use local system OCR after a screenshot is saved so screenshot history can be searched by text. Windows and macOS are supported; Linux is not supported yet.
plugin_screenshot_retention_days_tooltip: Screenshots older than this many days are automatically deleted.
plugin_screenshot_history_empty_subtitle: Use screenshot new to start a new screenshot

plugin_explorer_add_quick_jump_title: Add this path to quick jump paths
plugin_explorer_setting_enable_type_to_s: When File Explorer is focused, just start typing to open Wox and filter the current folder. Press Esc to cancel.
plugin_explorer_setting_quick_jump_paths: After adding a folder, you can jump to it quickly in type-to-search. When file explorer is focused, you can also run explorer add to quickly add the current path.
plugin_clipboard_image_text_recognition_: Recognize text in clipboard images locally so Image searches can match the text inside them.

plugin_shell_commands_tooltip: Configure custom shell commands with aliases. Use {query} as a placeholder for dynamic arguments. Search for an alias in global query to execute the command directly.

plugin_script_runtime_python_missing_mar:
## ⚠️ Python Not Found

This script plugin requires **Python** to run, but Python was not found on your system.

Please download and install Python from the official website:

- [python.org/downloads](https://www.python.org/downloads/)

This script plugin requires **Node.js** to run, but Node.js was not found on your system.

Please download and install Node.js from the official website:

- [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org/)

> After installation, restart Wox and try again.
plugin_script_runtime_missing_markdown:

plugin_doctor_accessibility_required: You need to grant Wox Accessibility permission to use this plugin
plugin_doctor_accessibility_granted: You have granted Wox Accessibility permission
plugin_doctor_accessibility_explanation:
# Why Wox Needs Accessibility Permission

Wox requires accessibility permission to perform the following functions:

- **Global Hotkeys**: Allow you to activate Wox from anywhere using keyboard shortcuts
- **Window Management**: Get information about active windows to provide context-aware results
- **Keyboard Simulation**: Enable features like pasting results directly into applications

Without this permission, some features of Wox will be limited or unavailable.

plugin_doctor_database_repair_manual: Recovered database created at: %s. Please quit Wox and replace wox.db manually.
plugin_doctor_database_fix_guidance: Possible database inconsistency detected (often occurs when the database is stored in a cloud sync drive). We recommend restoring the database from a backup and avoiding placing the data directory under iCloud/Dropbox or similar sync paths. Detailed errors have been logged.
plugin_browser_server_port_tooltip:
The port for the websocket server to communicate with the browser extension. Default is 34988.
Install the Chrome extension from [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/wox/bjbkdpjdnagiongdfemjhepkkglnailh).

plugin_ai_chat_enable_fallback_search_to: When enabled, Wox can return 'use AI Chat for <query>' as fallback when no non-debounced plugin returns a result yet. Debounced plugins are not waited for, so late results may still appear afterward
plugin_ai_chat_query_focus_tooltip: When enabled, automatically focus the chat input box and collapse the sidebar when opening chat via a query.
plugin_theme_ai_command_description: Generate a new theme with AI
plugin_theme_ai_input_hint: Please describe the theme you want to generate
plugin_theme_ai_waiting: Waiting for response from AI provider
plugin_theme_restore_command_description: Remove all custom themes and restore to default
plugin_theme_restore_title: Remove all custom themes and restore to default
plugin_theme_select_model: Please select an AI model in theme settings
plugin_theme_setting_ai_model_tooltip: AI model to use for generating theme.
plugin_emoji_add_keyword_hint: Add custom keywords to help you find this emoji faster, separate multiple with commas.
plugin_emoji_setting_ai_enable_tooltip: Use AI to match emojis when typing.
plugin_emoji_setting_ai_model_tooltip: Model used for AI emoji matching.
ui_ai_chat_failed_to_chat: Failed to chat, please try again
onboarding_subtitle: A quick pass through the features that make Wox faster to use
onboarding_welcome_description: Configure the basics first, then skim the productivity features you can enable later.
onboarding_permissions_description: Some Wox features need operating-system permission before they can work reliably.
onboarding_main_hotkey_description: Choose how you open Wox from anywhere.
onboarding_selection_hotkey_description: Select any text or file, press the hotkey, and Wox instantly searches it — translate, open, copy path, and more without retyping.
onboarding_appearance_description: Pick a comfortable launcher width and interface size.
onboarding_glance_description: Show short, glanceable live information beside the query box without getting in your way.
onboarding_action_panel_description: Use the action panel to run more actions on the current result.
onboarding_advanced_queries_description: Learn the query tools that let Wox act without extra typing.
onboarding_finish_description: The guide is complete. You can reopen it from About.
onboarding_welcome_card_body: Wox opens apps, files, plugins, AI actions, and custom queries from one focused input.
onboarding_query_concept_result1_subtitl: Fast file search — install from plugin store
onboarding_permissions_lite_body: Windows and Linux can continue with the default setup. Some plugins may still ask for their own permissions later.
onboarding_permission_accessibility_body: Required for selected text, keyboard automation, and reliable typing into other apps.
onboarding_permission_disk_body: Full Disk Access is optional, but limited disk access can reduce File Search and file result coverage.
onboarding_main_hotkey_tip: Click the recorder and press the shortcut you want to use for opening Wox.
onboarding_selection_hotkey_tip: Requires Accessibility permission so Wox can read what you have selected.
onboarding_glance_loading_body: Wox is waiting for installed plugins to publish concise Glance items.
onboarding_glance_empty_body: You can continue now and choose a short Glance item later from Settings > UI after plugins finish loading or new plugins are installed.
onboarding_action_panel_card_title: Run more actions from the selected result
onboarding_action_panel_card_body: Select a result and press the action-panel shortcut to copy, open, preview, run plugin actions, or use result-specific commands without leaving the keyboard.
onboarding_query_hotkeys_body: Bind any hotkey to a query you use often — press it and Wox opens with results instantly, no typing needed.
onboarding_query_shortcuts_body: Give long queries a short alias — type a few letters and Wox expands them into the full query for you.
onboarding_tray_queries_body: Pin frequently used queries to the system tray so you can trigger them with a single click, without opening Wox first.
onboarding_wpm_install_body: Extend Wox with plugins for translation, clipboard history, password management, and more — type wpm install to browse and install.
onboarding_wpm_install_result_subtitle: Install from the Wox plugin store
onboarding_theme_install_body: Make Wox look the way you like — type theme to browse and install community themes.
onboarding_theme_install_result_subtitle: Install from the Wox theme store
onboarding_finish_card_body: Everything here can be changed later in Settings. If you run into any issues or have feature suggestions, feel free to open an issue on GitHub.
